title: Pan-Seared Fish with Apple Cider Glaze
description: A sweet and savory dish featuring pan-seared fish glazed with a mixture of apple cider and vinegar.
instructions: Season the fish with salt, pepper, and thyme (if using).
Heat a skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the fish to the skillet, skin side up (if it has skin).
Cook for 3-4 minutes or until the skin is crispy.
Flip the fish over and cook for another 3-4 minutes.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven.
Bake for 8-10 minutes or until the fish is cooked through.
While the fish is cooking, reduce the apple cider by half in a saucepan over medium heat.
Add the vinegar to the reduced apple cider and stir to combine.
Glaze the fish with the apple cider mixture during the last 2 minutes of cooking.
Serve the fish hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
